subtitles.original: 大胆なバースの中
subtitles.english: In this daring verse,

subtitles.original: さあ みんなで大団円 迎えに行こう
subtitles.english: let's all head towards a happy ending together!

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 びしょ濡れの舞台は ミラクルなパレット
subtitles.english: Ah, this soaking wet stage is a miracle palette!

subtitles.original: おー
subtitles.english: Oh...

subtitles.original: 特報
subtitles.english: [Special News]

subtitles.original: その3
subtitles.english: [Part 3]

subtitles.original: 新情報
subtitles.english: [New Information]

subtitles.original: 箱根探訪編
subtitles.english: [Hakone Exploration Edition]

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでんがご案内 ピクセルミュージアム
subtitles.english: Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum!

subtitles.original: 追加ダウンロードコンテンツ 箱根探訪編 配信決定！
subtitles.english: Release confirmed for the Hakone Exploration DLC!

subtitles.original: イベント展示のご案内
subtitles.english: [Information on Event Exhibition]

subtitles.original: 今回のテーマは... 箱根！
subtitles.english: This time's theme is... Hakone!

subtitles.original: らでん館長の大好きな 箱根にまつわる作品をご用意！
subtitles.english: We have works related to Hakone, which Director Raden loves!

subtitles.original: 館内もイベント仕様で 箱根の魅力がたっぷり！
subtitles.english: The museum is customized for the event, packed with Hakone's charm!

subtitles.original: もちろん 解説はフルボイス！
subtitles.english: And of course, the commentary is fully voiced!

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでんがご案内 ピクセルミュージアム
subtitles.english: Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum!

subtitles.original: 追加ダウンロードコンテンツ 箱根探訪編 2026年12月配信予定！
subtitles.english: DLC: Hakone Exploration Edition scheduled for December 2026!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待つたけねー！
subtitles.english: Please wait just a little bit!

subtitles.original: な、な、なんと！
subtitles.english: W-W-What?!

subtitles.original: 昨年6月5日の発売から1年を待たずに
subtitles.english: Before even a year has passed since its release on June 5th last year...

subtitles.original: 「儒烏風亭らでんがご案内 ピクセルミュージアム」の
subtitles.english: the additional downloadable content for...

subtitles.original: 追加ダウンロードコンテンツ「箱根探訪編」の配信が決定しました！やったー！
subtitles.english: 'Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum,' 'Hakone Exploration Edition,' has been confirmed! Yay!

subtitles.original: みんながね、いっぱいダウンロードしてくれて、
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to everyone downloading it so much,

subtitles.original: みんながたくさん遊んでくれたおかげです！本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: and playing it a lot! Thank you so very much!

subtitles.original: 今回の舞台は、皆様お馴染みの「箱根」でございます！
subtitles.english: The stage this time is the familiar Hakone!

subtitles.original: え、前作に引き続き「箱根ガラスの森美術館」様に加え、
subtitles.english: Following the previous game, in addition to the Hakone Glass Forest Museum,

subtitles.original: 今回はなんと、
subtitles.english: this time, incredibly,

subtitles.original: 「ポーラ美術館」様と「小田急箱根」様にもご協力いただけることとなりました！拍手！
subtitles.english: we are also collaborating with the Pola Museum of Art and Odakyu Hakone! Please clap!

subtitles.original: え、館長のプライベートルームもイベント仕様にアップデート！
subtitles.english: The Director's private room is also updated for the event!

subtitles.original: 箱根の魅力マシマシでお届けいたしますよ。いいでしょう？
subtitles.english: We'll deliver even more Hakone charm. Isn't that great?

subtitles.original: そんな追加ダウンロードコンテンツ「箱根探訪編」は、2026年12月に配信予定！
subtitles.english: This DLC, Hakone Exploration Edition, is scheduled to be released in December 2026!

subtitles.original: さあそしてですね、来週5月23日、24日に
subtitles.english: And next week, on May 23rd and 24th,

subtitles.original: 京都にて開催されます「BitSummit 14th」に「らでピク」も登場！
subtitles.english: 'Radepiku' will appear at BitSummit 14th held in Kyoto!

subtitles.original: 大好評発売中の「らでピク」の試遊や、
subtitles.english: There will be a demo play of the popular 'Radepiku,'

subtitles.original: 「箱根探訪編」のキービジュアルポストカードの配布もあるみたいですよ！
subtitles.english: and they'll also distribute Hakone Exploration Edition key visual postcards!

subtitles.original: 詳しい情報は、公式ホームページとジュピターさんの公式Xを要チェックです！
subtitles.english: Be sure to check the official homepage and Jupiter's official X account for details!

subtitles.original: まだまだ嬉しい情報もあるかも？
subtitles.english: There might be even more exciting news!

subtitles.original: それでは、リリースまでお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: So please look forward to the release!

subtitles.original: はい！えーそして、そして、
subtitles.english: Yes! And, and...

subtitles.original: 皆さんお待たせかね、儒烏風亭らでん100万人記念グッズが発売するぞー！
subtitles.english: the moment you've all been waiting for, Juufuutei Raden's 1-million subscriber commemorative goods are going on sale!

subtitles.original: ごめんね、今日本当に何か発表が多くて。
subtitles.english: Sorry, there are really so many announcements today, haha.

subtitles.original: え、早速詳細見ていきましょう。1つ目はこちら、デン！
subtitles.english: Let's check out the details right away. First is this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: 新衣装でライブ！アクリルブロック。いや、めっちゃ疲れてる、らでんが映っちゃった。
subtitles.english: New Outfit Live! Acrylic Block. Oh, the extremely tired Raden was shown...

subtitles.original: 新衣装でライブ！アクリルブロック。
subtitles.english: New Outfit Live! Acrylic Block.

subtitles.original: ライブステージで楽しそうに歌う新衣装のらでん。森倉円先生の描き下ろしでございます。いいでしょう？
subtitles.english: Raden singing happily on stage in her new outfit, drawn by Morikura En-sensei. Isn't it wonderful?

subtitles.original: こちら、アクリルブロックの表裏に印刷されておりまして、
subtitles.english: This is printed on both the front and back of the acrylic block,

subtitles.original: めっちゃね、奥行きが感じられるものとなってるんですよ。
subtitles.english: making you really feel the depth.

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら、デン！
subtitles.english: Next is this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: はい、らでんの衣装いろいろ3連結アクリルキーホルダー。
subtitles.english: Yes, Raden's Various Outfits 3-Link Acrylic Keychain!

subtitles.original: 新衣装、通常衣装、フラッシュポイント衣装の3種類の3連結アクリルキーホルダーとなっております。
subtitles.english: It features her new outfit, default outfit, and Flashpoint outfit connected together.

subtitles.original: イラストは、「心パズルリズム」の時の、あの後ろにね、可愛いイラスト流れてたんですけれども、
subtitles.english: The illustrations are by the familiar Tsubomilku-sensei, who did the cute illustrations...

subtitles.original: でお馴染み、つぼみるく先生でございます！
subtitles.english: ...shown in the background of 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm'!

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら、デン！
subtitles.english: Next is this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: 新衣装モチーフピンバッジセット。新衣装をモチーフにしたピンバッジセットですよ。
subtitles.english: New Outfit Motif Pin Badge Set. It's a set of pin badges designed after her new outfit!

subtitles.original: え、懐中時計、え、それから、今してないけど、マスク、
subtitles.english: There are four types: a pocket watch, a mask—which I'm not wearing right now—

subtitles.original: シルクハット、モノクルの4種類となっております。
subtitles.english: a top hat, and a monocle.

subtitles.original: 続いてはこちら、デン！
subtitles.english: Next is this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: ライブ前のトラブル！？ボイス。らでんが書き下ろした台本です。どんなトラブルが...
subtitles.english: Trouble Before the Live!? Voice. It's a voice pack scripted by Raden herself. What kind of trouble...

responses.thoughts:
**Analysis of Juufuutei Raden's Announcement Video**

Okay, here's the breakdown of this video, from my perspective. Looks like we're dealing with a promotional announcement for a DLC.

First up, a quick song plays. The lyrics (translated):

*   00:00.000 - 00:02.800: "In this daring verse,"
*   00:02.800 - 00:09.500: "Let's all head towards a happy ending together!"
*   00:09.500 - 00:16.800: "Ah, this soaking wet stage is a miracle palette!"
*   00:16.800 - 00:21.500: "Oh..."

Then we move onto the main event. At 00:25, we get "[Special News]" and then "[Part 3]" at 00:27.800. Looks like we're getting to the meat of things.

At 00:33.800 we get "[New Information]" and then at 00:36.200 "[Hakone Exploration Edition]", which is the actual title.

At 00:52.100, the voiceover kicks in. Here's what Raden is saying:

*   00:52.100 - 00:55.700: "Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum"
*   00:55.700 - 01:00.700: "Release confirmed for the Hakone Exploration DLC!"
*   01:01.000 - 01:04.500: "[Information on Event Exhibition]"
*   01:05.100 - 01:08.400: "This time's theme is... Hakone!"
*   01:08.400 - 01:13.900: "We have works related to Hakone, which Director Raden loves!"
*   01:13.900 - 01:19.400: "The museum is customized for the event, packed with Hakone's charm!"
*   01:19.400 - 01:24.400: "And of course, the commentary is fully voiced!"
*   01:25.800 - 01:29.800: "Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum"
*   01:29.800 - 01:36.500: "DLC: Hakone Exploration Edition scheduled for December 2026!"
*   01:36.500 - 01:39.500: "Please wait just a little bit!"

After a moment, Raden makes a live speech at 01:42.

*   01:44.200 - 01:48.300: "W-W-What?!"
*   01:48.400 - 01:52.900: "Before even a year has passed since its release on June 5th last year..."
*   01:52.900 - 02:03.200: "the additional downloadable content for 'Juufuutei Raden's Guided Tour: Pixel Museum,' 'Hakone Exploration Edition,' has been confirmed! Yay!"
*   02:03.200 - 02:08.100: "It's all thanks to everyone downloading it so much,"
*   02:08.100 - 02:12.700: "and playing it a lot! Thank you so very much!"
*   02:12.800 - 02:18.500: "The stage this time is the familiar Hakone!"
*   02:18.800 - 02:24.300: "Following the previous game, in addition to the Hakone Glass Forest Museum,"
*   02:24.300 - 02:27.500: "this time, incredibly,"
*   02:27.500 - 02:36.700: "we are
